# Push Notifications Setup Guide

## Overview
This LMS application supports web push notifications using the Web Push API and VAPID (Voluntary Application Server Identification).

## Requirements
- HTTPS (required for production) or localhost (for development)
- Modern browser with Service Worker and Push API support
- VAPID keys generated for your domain

## VAPID Key Generation

### Step 1: Install web-push package
```bash
npm install -g web-push
```

### Step 2: Generate VAPID keys
```bash
npx web-push generate-vapid-keys
```

This will output:
```
=======================================
Public Key:
 notifications even when you're not on this page. Requires browser permission.</small>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
